context: Tests whether the agent separates iOS 17 core TipKit from iOS 18+ TipGroup, CloudKit sync, and duration APIs.

checklist.name: Availability split
checklist.description: Marks `TipGroup`, `.cloudKitContainer(...)`, `.automatic`, and `MaxDisplayDuration` as iOS 18+ rather than treating all TipKit APIs as iOS 17 core APIs.

checklist.name: iOS 17 fallback
checklist.description: Suggests availability gates, an iOS 17 fallback using rules/events/parameters and explicit invalidation, custom synced state, or raising the minimum OS.

checklist.name: TipGroup priority
checklist.description: States that plain `TipGroup` defaults to `.firstAvailable` and that `TipGroup(.ordered)` is the iOS 18+ sequence mode where later tips wait for previous tips to be invalidated.

checklist.name: CloudKit setup
checklist.description: Mentions required setup for TipKit CloudKit sync, including iCloud with CloudKit and Background Modes > Remote notifications.

checklist.name: Container choice
checklist.description: Recommends an intentional CloudKit container choice, preferably a dedicated `.tips` container, and explains `.automatic` selection risk.

checklist.name: Duration semantics
checklist.description: Explains that `MaxDisplayDuration(300)` is iOS 18+, cumulative display time, and not a substitute for explicit invalidation of sequence steps.
